title: pilosella hypeurya subsp. obtusifolia
intro: Pilosella hypeurya subsp. obtusifolia is a subspecies of the Pilosella hypeurya plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella hypeurya subsp. obtusifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be consumed orally or used topically to treat skin conditions.
